claimText: Caltech admissions AI guidelines were approved by the Undergraduate Faculty Admissions and Graduate Studies committees for the Fall 2026 application cycle, and may evolve for future cycles.

citation.citationTitle: Undergraduate and Graduate Admissions AI Policy: Guidelines for Fall Applicants
